creator: decui@microsoft.com
text:
(In reply to Dmitry from comment #43)
The screenshot shows "Setup of Shared code failed, error -2". Looks like somehow e1000_init_phy_params() returns -E1000_ERR_PHY.


Since Ubuntu VM works, this should be a FreeBSD issue. From the description, there are 2 issues when the Intel 82576 NIC is assigned to FreeBSD VM:
1. Gen2 FreeBSD VM fails to use the NIC due to the -E1000_ERR_PHY error.
2. Gen1 FreeBSD VM fails to use MSI-X, but luckily MSI still works.

The first issue needs to be debugged first. Since Gen-1 VM works with the same NIC (despite the "unable to map MSI-X table" issue), I suppose the NIC driver itself basically looks ok, and I guess the difference in Gen2 VM may be that the MMIO address range assigned to the Gen2 VM is still somehow not quite right, though Wei's 7/30/2020 fix is already used?  @Wei
